hooks.command: FILE=$(jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // empty'); if echo "$FILE" | grep -qE '\.dart$'; then cd /Users/park/development/gps_meeting_app && /Users/park/development/flutter/bin/dart analyze "$FILE" 2>&1 | grep -v '^Analyzing'; fi

cd /Users/park/development/gps_meeting_app && if ! git diff --quiet || ! git diff --cached --quiet || [ -n "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ]; then echo '--- flutter test ---' && if /Users/park/development/flutter/bin/flutter test 2>&1; then git add -A && git commit -m "chore: auto-save $(date +'%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push origin main; else echo 'flutter test 실패 — 커밋 건너뜀'; fi; fi
hooks.statusMessage: 테스트 검증 후 자동 저장 중...
